meta.title: Meeko
meta.description: Meeko — creative studio landing: services, work, about, and contact.

hero.description: I specialize in HTML, CSS, WordPress, and Framer, with a strong track record of converting designs into responsive websites.
hero.portfolioDescription: Explore selected projects and my approach to design.
hero.aboutDescription: A closer look at my background, skills, and creative journey.
hero.contactDescription: Let's work together to bring your ideas and vision to life.

works.title: My selected works
works.description: With my keen eye for detail and sharp critical thinking skills, I specialize in crafting captivating websites, products, and experiences.

bigShake.title: The Big Shake
bigShake.description: Built around clarity and consistency, this work defines a refined visual identity shaped by modern aesthetics and cohesive brand expression throughout.
bigShake.imageAlt: Preview of The Big Shake project

transparentThings.title: Transparent Things
transparentThings.description: With an emphasis on precision and structure, this work brings clarity and modern aesthetics together within a consistent visual system framework.

phantomLimb.title: Phantom Limb
phantomLimb.description: By combining clarity with contemporary design thinking, the project delivers a considered visual identity with strong and consistent brand alignment.

heatLightning.title: Heat Lightning
heatLightning.description: This project is driven by a refined design approach that balances clarity and intention with contemporary visuals and overall cohesive brand harmony.

natalie.quote: “From the very beginning, the collaboration felt effortless. Every idea was carefully refined into something meaningful, and the final result was exactly what we hoped for.”
natalie.name: Natalie Brooks

daniel.quote: “I've worked with many designers before, but this experience was on another level. The attention to detail and thoughtful approach made the process smooth and enjoyable.”
daniel.name: Daniel Foster

ethan.quote: “I wasn't sure what to expect at first, but everything turned out better than expected. Communication was clear, timelines were respected, and the final result felt modern.”
ethan.name: Ethan Caldwell

process.title: High-quality work with real value considered.
process.description: My working process revolves around an approach aimed at maximizing productivity and creativity with clarity and focus. It begins with thorough research and planning, where I gather relevant information and outline key objectives.

step01.title: Problem Framing
step01.description: I explore insights, and market context to clearly define the problem. Research findings are translated into ideas that shape direction, inform decisions, and establish a strong foundation for the project.

step02.title: Shaping the Idea
step02.description: Here, I refine initial ideas into clear concepts by aligning strategy and creativity. I develop structural directions that balance innovation with feasibility, while supporting both brand goals and user expectations.

step03.title: Testing the Experience
step03.description: In this phase, I bring concepts to life through prototyping and real-world testing. I validate functionality, usability, and clarity by iterating on feedback, refining details, and resolving issues before final delivery.

step04.title: Polishing the Outcome
step04.description: In the final stage of design, thorough attention is given to refine the product, ensuring it meets high standards of quality and functionality through testing, tweaking, and iteration to address any remaining issues.

stats.title: My numbers say it all
stats.description: These numbers reflect the experience and consistency, and measurable impact behind the work I've delivered over the years.

about.title: Hey! That's me.
about.paragraph1: I am Meeko, a multidisciplinary designer and blogger based in the vibrant city of Los Angeles. With a keen eye for aesthetics and a knack for innovative solutions, I thrive in the dynamic intersection of design.
about.paragraph2: My journey in this dynamic and ever-evolving field has been a testament to my unwavering passion for meticulously crafting meaningful user experiences, leveraging cutting-edge technologies, and fearlessly pushing the boundaries of digital creativity.
about.capabilitiesLead: The services I offer are meticulously crafted and tailored to cater specifically to your unique needs and requirements.

footer.title: Let's talk about your project.
footer.description: Got a project in mind? Let's create something great. We can transform that idea into real product.
